title: Exxon Qualified Settlement Fund – Missing Persons List
summary: The following is a list of names of those EQSF claimants whose money is currently being held and are unable to contact for various reasons. As a result, any EQSF settlement proceeds due to be paid on their claims are on HOLD. Such issues include: Bad Address, Unverified SSN or Tax Payer Identificati...

title: USDA Begins Last Phase of Data Gathering For 2015 Agricultural Resource Management Survey (ARMS)
summary: Interviewers representing the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) will spend the next several months visiting farms and ranches across the nation as the agency conducts the last phase of its 2015 Agricultural Resource Management Survey (ARMS).
